title: Eziglide Highlighters Pens 48-Pack, 5 Assorted Colours - Neon Assorted Chisel Tip Marker for Bold & Fine Marking, 1-4.5mm Line for Clear Marking, Ideal for Schools, Universities, & Offices
features: Premium Hydrocarbon Tip: EziGlide markers & highlighters boast a premium hydrocarbon chisel tip for smooth and clear marking on paper & card ensuring precise but bold highlighting.
Ergonomic shaped barrel: making it easy and comfortable to hold when highlighting/ underlining/ note marking. Cute stationary for home or the office and great marker highlighter pens for school.
Vibrant fluorescent water based ink: Perfect highlighter pens multipack for; revision stationary & colour-coding, drawing, designing and colouring. Great mini highlighters or bullet journal pens.
Flexible Writing Width: Chisel Tip enables you to draw a Fine or Broad line (1 - 4.5mm width), which is great for highlighting, underlining and colouring
EziGlide's Package Includes: 48-Pack Highlighter Box Incl. 24x yellow highlighter pens, 6x green highlighters, 6x pink highlighter pens, 6x blue highlighter markers and 6x orange highlighters.
